scope.branch: feature/T-025-m4-b-2-capability-list-components (created from main at the M4-B.1 closeout commit c151e90; the M4-B.2 closeout commit feat(m4-b.2): add AppCapabilityList + AppKeyValueList data-owning design-system components is on this branch; the branch is fast-forwarded into main per the branching strategy rule 6; the branch is deleted per rule 7)
in_scope: Land the AppCapabilityList data-owning four-state design-system component at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Diagnostics/AppCapabilityList.razor (+ .razor.cs + .razor.css). State machine: IsLoading -> Loading (or default AppLoading); ErrorMessage -> Error (or default AppErrorState 'Cannot load capabilities'); Capabilities null/empty -> Empty (or default AppEmptyState 'No capabilities detected'); else -> Populated (or default AppStack of AppCard entries with AppStatusDot Success/Error, version (font-mono, muted), AppBadge 'Credential set' for CredentialAvailable=true). aria-live=polite on the populated list.

Land the AppKeyValueList data-owning four-state design-system component at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Diagnostics/AppKeyValueList.razor (+ .razor.cs + .razor.css). Same state machine. Default Populated: an AppCard containing a definition list (dl/dt/dd) of key-value rows. The Format parameter (Plain/Boolean/Code) controls value rendering: Plain renders literal text, Boolean renders a check/cross icon for true/false (case-insensitive; non-boolean values render as literal text), Code renders in a monospaced code element. aria-live=polite on the populated container.
Append the AppKeyValueListFormat enum (Plain, Boolean, Code) to src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Common/Enums.cs (mirroring the M1.2 enum pattern).

Land 13 bUnit tests at tests/AiEng.Platform.ComponentTests/Components/Diagnostics/AppCapabilityListTests.cs (Populated one-card-per-capability; Empty when no capabilities; Loading when IsLoading=true; Error when ErrorMessage set; AppStatusDot Success for Available=true; AppStatusDot Error for Available=false; Credential set badge when CredentialAvailable=true; omits Credential set badge when CredentialAvailable=false; custom Populated slot overrides default; custom Loading slot overrides default; custom Empty slot overrides default; custom Error slot overrides default; populated list has aria-live=polite).

Land 15 bUnit tests at tests/AiEng.Platform.ComponentTests/Components/Diagnostics/AppKeyValueListTests.cs (Populated one-row-per-item; Empty when no items; Loading when IsLoading=true; Error when ErrorMessage set; Boolean check for true; Boolean cross for false; Boolean literal for non-boolean; Code in <code> element; Plain literal text; custom Populated slot overrides default; custom Loading slot overrides default; custom Empty slot overrides default; custom Error slot overrides default; populated container has aria-live=polite).

Add the C-023 AppCapabilityList + C-024 AppKeyValueList capability records to .ai/state/capabilities.json (status: Accepted; completion_status: Delivered; delivered_by_milestone: M4-B; consumed_by_milestones: M4-B.3 + M5+; full evidence block populated with the new files + commit + tests).
